/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libcamera_detection_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so -o libcamera_detection_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so CMakeFiles/camera_detection_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/camera_detection_interfaces/srv/detail/detect_pipe__type_support_c.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib:/home/caleb/Documents/robot_ws/build/camera_detection_interfaces: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so libcamera_detection_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libfastcdr.so.1.0.29 /opt/ros/humble/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
